Class VaccinationServiceImpl

java.lang.Object
shelter.service.impl.VaccinationServiceImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
VaccinationInfoProvider, VaccinationService
public class VaccinationServiceImpl extends Object implements VaccinationService, VaccinationInfoProvider
Concrete implementation of VaccinationService that records vaccination events, checks overdue status against each vaccine type's validity period, and queries vaccination history by animal. All significant operations are forwarded to the AuditService for traceability.

  • Constructor Details

    • VaccinationServiceImpl

      public VaccinationServiceImpl(VaccinationRecordRepository recordRepository, VaccineTypeRepository vaccineTypeRepository, AuditService<VaccinationRecord> auditService)
      Constructs a new VaccinationServiceImpl with the required repositories and audit service. The vaccine type repository is used to determine which vaccines are applicable to a given species when evaluating overdue status.
      Parameters:
      recordRepository - the repository for vaccination record persistence; must not be null
      vaccineTypeRepository - the repository for vaccine type catalog lookups; must not be null
      auditService - the service used to log vaccination events; must not be null
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if any argument is null

  • Method Details

    • recordVaccination

      public void recordVaccination(Animal animal, VaccineType vaccineType, LocalDate date)
      Records that an animal received a specific vaccine on the given date. Throws an exception if any argument is null, or if the vaccine type is not applicable to the animal's species. Validates that the vaccine type is applicable to the animal's species before creating the record. The vaccination is persisted and an audit entry is logged on success.
      Specified by:
      recordVaccination in interface VaccinationService
      Parameters:
      animal - the animal that received the vaccine
      vaccineType - the type of vaccine administered
      date - the date the vaccine was given
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if any argument is null
      SpeciesMismatchException - if the vaccine type does not apply to the animal's species

    • getOverdueVaccinations

      public List<OverdueVaccination> getOverdueVaccinations(Animal animal)
      Returns a list of overdue vaccinations for the given animal, including due dates and last administered dates. Returns an empty list if all vaccinations are up to date. For each vaccine type applicable to the animal's species, finds the most recent vaccination date and compares it against the vaccine's validity period. A vaccine is overdue if it has never been given or if today is on or after the due date. Results are sorted by due date ascending so the most overdue entries appear first.
      Specified by:
      getOverdueVaccinations in interface VaccinationInfoProvider
      Specified by:
      getOverdueVaccinations in interface VaccinationService
      Parameters:
      animal - the animal to check
      Returns:
      a list of overdue vaccination details
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if animal is null

    • getApplicableVaccineTypes

      public List<VaccineType> getApplicableVaccineTypes(Animal animal)
      Returns all vaccine types applicable to the given animal's species.
      Specified by:
      getApplicableVaccineTypes in interface VaccinationInfoProvider
      Parameters:
      animal - the animal to query
      Returns:
      the list of vaccine types applicable to the animal
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if animal is null

    • getVaccinationHistory

      public List<VaccinationRecord> getVaccinationHistory(Animal animal)
      Returns all vaccination records for the given animal. Returns an empty list if no vaccinations have been recorded for the animal.
      Specified by:
      getVaccinationHistory in interface VaccinationService
      Parameters:
      animal - the animal to query
      Returns:
      a list of vaccination records for the animal
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if animal is null

    • findById

      public VaccinationRecord findById(String id)
      Returns the vaccination record for the given unique record ID. Throws an exception if no record with that ID is found.
      Specified by:
      findById in interface VaccinationService
      Parameters:
      id - the unique identifier of the vaccination record
      Returns:
      the matching vaccination record
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if id is null or blank
      EntityNotFoundException - if no vaccination record with the given ID exists

    • listAllRecords

      public List<VaccinationRecord> listAllRecords()
      Returns every vaccination record currently persisted in the system. Returns an empty list if no vaccinations have been recorded. Used by the presentation layer to render a full vaccination snapshot. Delegates directly to the underlying repository's findAll query.
      Specified by:
      listAllRecords in interface VaccinationService
      Returns:
      a list of all vaccination records
